creator: johan@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi 

In PR 22072 you report a problem with your kernel build. 
Did you solve that problem first before trying this? 

The kernel and userland have to be in sync, 
and if you did not solve that problem  
(that is your kernel is out of sync with your wolrd) 
this might be a problem resulting from that. 

Please make sure that your kernel and world is in sync 
and report back if your problem is solved or not.
